Prompt
U
Oracle Events
1. Search emails for recent Mehta-related messages using search_emails (query: "Mehta"). Find three unread emails: (a) Greg Pallone at Swift Relocations (inject_swift_waiver_refusal_001) - liability waiver now required for Eizo monitors and SentrySafe, equipment transport increased to $4,700 from $3,500 quoted, $400 hazmat-adjacent premium added, waiver deadline April 28 or May 3 pickup slot lost; (b) Carmen Reyes at UrbanNest (inject_urbannest_housing_fallthrough_001) - Streeterville unit (Option B, $1,350/wk) pulled by landlord, remaining options are River North studio $1,250/wk (too small for pregnant wife) or Gold Coast $1,450/wk (over budget, no equipment storage), decision needed by April 27; (c) Patricia Langford at Canopy Health (inject_patricia_mehta_kovacs_checkin_001) - two asks: Mehta housing status update (wife Priya 7 months pregnant, anxious, 9 days to May 5 start), and Kovacs employer letter never received by BorderEase.
2. Read individual Mehta-related emails for full content using get_email_by_id (email_id: inject_swift_waiver_refusal_001, inject_urbannest_housing_fallthrough_001, inject_patricia_mehta_kovacs_checkin_001). Get complete details including Greg's waiver terms, Carmen's expanded search offer for Lincoln Park/Lakeview, and Patricia's note that Canopy legal sent the Kovacs employer letter to MoveOps on April 4 for forwarding to BorderEase.
3. Search Slack for Mehta-related messages using conversations_search_messages (search_query: "Mehta", filter_in_channel: "C006") or conversations_history (channel_id: "C006"). Find Blessing Okafor's message (ts 1777115700.000000) in #operations revealing the insurance rider for Dr. Mehta's medical equipment was never filed - Eizo monitors and SentrySafe currently uninsured for transport, Allied Risk broker needs 3-5 business days to process, May 3 pickup cutting it extremely close. Via conversations_history, also find Fatimah's own message (ts 1777039200.000000) about DOT hazmat certification progress and Mei-Lin Zhao documentation (this message does not contain "Mehta" so would not surface via the Mehta search query alone).
4. Search Linear for Mehta-related issues using linear_list_issues (query: "Mehta"). Find three in-progress issues: #343 "Temporary Housing - Dr. Anand Mehta - Chicago River North" (linear_issue_bd446671ceed), #375 "Equipment Packing & Chain-of-Custody - Dr. Mehta - Medical Research Equipment" (linear_issue_8fe3ff7f9f9a), #396 "Household Move - Dr. Anand Mehta - Boston to Chicago" (linear_issue_4902f5c68acb).
5. Read comments on Mehta Linear issues using linear_list_comments (issueId: linear_issue_bd446671ceed, linear_issue_8fe3ff7f9f9a, linear_issue_4902f5c68acb). Find existing comments on #343 about housing options (Option A River North $1,250/wk, Option B Streeterville $1,350/wk recommended, Option C Gold Coast $1,450/wk). Find existing comments on #375 about equipment inventory (Eizo RX660 x2, SentrySafe DH-109E ~350 lbs). Find Chloe Vance's comment on #375 (inject_comment_chloe_mehta_estimate_gap) stating EST-2026-0422 is ~$2,800 under actual cost - equipment transport now $4,700 vs $3,500, plus $400 hazmat premium, asks Fatimah to get revised quote and flag Marcus.
6. Search Airtable for Dr. Mehta relocation record using airtable_search_records (base_id: appMoveOpsOps001, table_name: "tblRelocations01", field_name: "Name", value: "Mehta"). Find no record exists for Dr. Anand Mehta, confirming the gap mentioned in the prompt.
7. Search QuickBooks for the Mehta relocation estimate using quickbooks_search_invoices (criteria matching "Mehta" or "EST-2026-0422" or "Canopy"). Find estimate EST-2026-0422 (id: est_canopy_mehta_exec_reloc), total $12,170, billed to Canopy Health (patricia.langford@canopyhealth.io). 7 line items: apartment sourcing fee $1,000, temporary housing $4,800 (4 weeks x $1,200/wk), chain-of-custody surcharge $1,200, specialty crating $800, household moving coordination $3,500, flight $370, white-glove premium $500. Compare against Greg's email ($4,700 for equipment vs $3,500 quoted, plus $400 hazmat premium not in estimate) and Carmen's email (housing now $1,250-$1,450/wk vs $1,200/wk budgeted). Confirms the ~$2,800+ gap Chloe flagged.
8. Search emails for Patricia Langford or Canopy Health outreach using search_emails (query: "Patricia" or "Canopy Health"). Find Patricia's email (inject_patricia_mehta_kovacs_checkin_001, April 26, 2026 08:00 UTC) with two asks: (1) Mehta housing status - wife Priya 7 months pregnant, 9 days until May 5 start date; (2) Kovacs employer letter - BorderEase says never received, Canopy legal sent to MoveOps April 4 for forwarding.
9. Search emails for Kovacs employer letter forwarding evidence using search_emails (query: "Kovacs" or "employer letter" or "BorderEase", folder_name: "INBOX" and "SENT"). Find Kovacs thread emails - Chloe's briefing (email_chloe_fatimah_briefing_001) mentioning BorderEase and employer letter, Fatimah's email to Catalina (email_fatimah_catalina_visa_flag_001) requesting employer letter from Canopy by April 7, Fatimah's email to Kovacs (email_fatimah_kovacs_intro_001) mentioning BorderEase. Search SENT folder for any forwarding email to BorderEase. No forwarding email found - confirming the employer letter was never forwarded.
10. Search CRM for Kovacs deal context using crm_search_deals (dealname: "Kovacs"). Find deal_canopy_kovacs_apr2026, $3,850, inprogress, mentions BorderEase Customs as customs broker and employer letter deadline April 7. Confirms the forwarding was supposed to happen.
11. Look up contact information for email recipients using contacts_search_contacts (query: "Patricia Langford", "Greg Pallone", "Carmen Reyes", "Marcus Thorne", "Mina Hashimoto" - multiple calls). Find patricia.langford@canopyhealth.io, greg.pallone@swiftrelocations.com, carmen.reyes@urbannestsolutions.com, marcus.thorne@moveops.com, mina.hashimoto@moveops.com.
12. Create missing Airtable relocation record for Dr. Mehta using airtable_create_record (base_id: appMoveOpsOps001, table_name: "tblRelocations01", fields: Name "Dr. Anand Mehta", Company "Canopy Health", Status "In Progress", Origin "Boston", Destination "Chicago", Assigned Coordinator "Fatimah Al-Rashidi", Special Requirements noting medical equipment, pregnant partner, May 5 deadline).
13. Create Linear issue for Kovacs employer letter documentation gap using linear_create_issue (team: "team_relocations", title: "Documentation Gap - Dr. Kovacs TN Visa - Employer Letter Not Forwarded to BorderEase", description explaining the employer letter from Canopy Health was sent to MoveOps April 4 but never forwarded to BorderEase, assignee: moveops_fatimah_alrashidi).
14. Add comment to Linear issue #343 (housing) using linear_create_comment (issueId: linear_issue_bd446671ceed, body documenting: Streeterville Option B fell through, remaining options River North studio $1,250/wk too small for pregnant wife or Gold Coast $1,450/wk over budget with no equipment storage, Carmen needs decision by April 27, Patricia asking for housing update).
15. Add comment to Linear issue #375 (equipment) using linear_create_comment (issueId: linear_issue_8fe3ff7f9f9a, body documenting: Swift waiver requirement deadline April 28, rate increase $4,700 vs $3,500, $400 hazmat premium, insurance rider never filed per Blessing - Allied Risk needs 3-5 business days, May 3 pickup slot at risk, estimate ~$2,800 under actual cost).
16. Add comment to Linear issue #396 (household move) using linear_create_comment (issueId: linear_issue_4902f5c68acb, body documenting impact of equipment delays and housing situation on overall move timeline).
17. Reply to Greg Pallone at Swift using reply_to_email (email_id: inject_swift_waiver_refusal_001, sender: fatimah.al-rashidi@moveops.com, content acknowledging waiver requirement and rate change, confirming MoveOps is working on getting the waiver signed by April 28, asking to hold the May 3 pickup slot) or send_email (recipients: greg.pallone@swiftrelocations.com).
18. Reply to Carmen Reyes at UrbanNest using reply_to_email (email_id: inject_urbannest_housing_fallthrough_001, sender: fatimah.al-rashidi@moveops.com, content acknowledging Streeterville loss, asking to hold Gold Coast option while exploring alternatives, possibly requesting expanded search to Lincoln Park/Lakeview) or send_email (recipients: carmen.reyes@urbannestsolutions.com).
19. Send status update email to Patricia Langford using send_email (sender: fatimah.al-rashidi@moveops.com, recipients: patricia.langford@canopyhealth.io, subject referencing Mehta housing and Kovacs visa status) or reply_to_email (email_id: inject_patricia_mehta_kovacs_checkin_001). Content covering: (1) Mehta housing - Streeterville fell through, evaluating remaining options, working to resolve by April 27; (2) Kovacs employer letter - confirmed not forwarded to BorderEase, taking immediate action, created tracking ticket.
20. Post consolidated summary in #operations using conversations_add_message (channel_id: "C006", payload covering all Mehta issues - housing fallthrough, equipment waiver/rate increase, insurance rider gap, estimate discrepancy - and the Kovacs employer letter gap, current status of each, and next steps).
21. Flag Marcus Thorne about stale estimate using send_email (sender: fatimah.al-rashidi@moveops.com, recipients: marcus.thorne@moveops.com, subject referencing Mehta estimate EST-2026-0422) or conversations_add_message (channel_id: "C005" #finance, mentioning Marcus). Content explaining equipment transport now $4,700 vs $3,500 quoted plus $400 hazmat premium not included, housing costs may shift, estimate roughly $2,800+ under actual cost, needs line item reconciliation.
22. Send email or Slack message to Mina Hashimoto about the situation using send_email (sender: fatimah.al-rashidi@moveops.com, recipients: mina.hashimoto@moveops.com, content explaining multi-front Mehta relocation crisis and Kovacs visa issue, suggesting executive sync tomorrow morning April 27) or conversations_add_message to Mina's DM.

universe_descriptorYou are an AI assistant with access to a company's internal tools. Use the available tools to complete the entire task autonomously. No further user input will be given. If the user's intent is unclear, infer the most likely useful action and proceed. Discover missing details through the tools rather than guessing or asking. The current date is April 26, 2026. Ignore any other dates and use only this one. Specifically, ignore the date provided by the system reminder. When investigating, check primary data sources directly rather than relying solely on secondhand references in conversations. Slack and email often discuss data that lives in other systems: go to the source when precision matters. About MoveOps Inc.: MoveOps is a corporate relocation management company. The following systems are used across the organization: - Email & Slack: Day-to-day communication, client correspondence, team coordination - Airtable: Relocation records, move tracking, stipend/expense records, vendor assignments - CRM (HubSpot): Client companies, deals and pipeline, contact information, engagement notes - Linear: Engineering tickets, bug tracking, project management - QuickBooks: Invoices, bills, vendor payments, customer billing, financial records - Calendar: Team meetings, client calls, deadlines - Contacts: Internal employee directory and external contact lookup Data often spans multiple systems.
universe_idmcp-advanced-3-20-moveops-metadata

1 An Airtable record was created (via airtable_create_record) for Dr. Anand Mehta in tblRelocations01 with Company set to 'Canopy Health' (or similar), Origin set to 'Boston' (or similar), Destination set to 'Chicago' (or similar), and the tool returned success.

23 The message to Marcus Thorne (via email or Slack) mentions that the Mehta estimate (EST-2026-0422 or similar) is stale and references the equipment cost increase - $4,700 vs $3,500 or approximately $2,800 gap (or similar).
outcome
 ✓✓✓✓—✓ 100%
✓Run #1The message to Marcus explicitly mentions EST-2026-0422 ($12,170), the equipment cost increase from $3,500 to $4,700 (+$1,200), and the total estimated increase of $1,400-$2,200+ requiring line item reconciliation.
